CustomField.description: Sum of Purchase Loans divided by the Appraised Leasehold value, or if none (not a land trust), Sum of Purchase Loans divided by the Appraised Unrestricted Market Value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Sum of Purchase Loans divided by the Appraised Leasehold value, or if none (not a land trust), Sum of Purchase Loans divided by the Appraised Unrestricted Market Value.
CustomField.label: ZZ DO NOT USE
